meta.summary: STAR RNA-seq aligner for genome indexing, splice-aware read alignment, long-read alignment mode, chimeric junction discovery, and STARsolo single-cell quantification.
meta.description: STAR RNA-seq aligner for genome indexing, splice-aware read alignment, long-read alignment mode, chimeric junction discovery, and STARsolo single-cell quantification.

test: STAR --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'STAR version=2.7.11b' >/dev/null && STARlong --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'STAR version=2.7.11b' >/dev/null

bash --version >/dev/null && gzip --version >/dev/null && zcat --version >/dev/null && bzip2 --help >/dev/null 2>&1 && awk 'BEGIN { print "awk-ok" }' | grep -Fx 'awk-ok' >/dev/null && samtools --version >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-star-smoke /tmp/taf-star-index.log /tmp/taf-star-align.log && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-star-smoke/genome /tmp/taf-star-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-star-smoke && printf '>chr1
TTGACCAAGTTGACTGACCTGACGATCGTACGTTAGCACCGATGCTAGTCAACCGGTACCGTTAAGCTTAGGCTAAGTCCGATCGATGACCTTGA
' > genome.fa && STAR --runThreadN 1 --runMode genomeGenerate --genomeDir genome --genomeFastaFiles genome.fa --genomeSAindexNbases 3 --genomeChrBinNbits 5 >/tmp/taf-star-index.log 2>&1 && printf '@r1
GATCGTACGTTAGCACCGATGCTAGTCA
+
IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && STAR --runThreadN 1 --genomeDir genome --readFilesIn reads.fq.gz --readFilesCommand zcat --outFileNamePrefix out/ --outSAMtype SAM >/tmp/taf-star-align.log 2>&1 && test -s out/Aligned.out.sam && grep -v '^@' out/Aligned.out.sam | cut -f3 | grep -Fx chr1 >/dev/null && grep -F 'Uniquely mapped reads %' out/Log.final.out >/dev/null && rm -rf /tmp/taf-star-smoke /tmp/taf-star-index.log /tmp/taf-star-align.log

rm -rf /tmp/taf-star-helper-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-star-helper-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-star-helper-smoke && printf 'chr1\tsrc\texon\t1\t10\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g1"; transcript_id "t1";\nchr1\tsrc\texon\t21\t30\t.\t+\t.\tgene_id "g1"; transcript_id "t1";\n' > genes.gtf && extractSJfromGTF.sh genes.gtf | grep -Fx 'chr1	11	20	+' >/dev/null && rm -rf /tmp/taf-star-helper-smoke

upstream.name: STAR
upstream.citation: Dobin et al. 2013, STAR: ultrafast universal RNA-seq aligner
